name: scan_broken_blueprints
description: Run BPDoctor — Bionics' 34-check Blueprint / AnimBP static analyzer. Scans every Blueprint in the open UE5 project for errors (missing parent class, null pin references, disconnected slots, empty state machines, MM schema problems, blend-weight sum violations, etc.). Read-only — no changes made. Run ue5_bpdoctor_fix_all after review.
prerequisites: UE5 Editor open with any project loaded
warnings: Scan can take 30-60s on a large project — this is normal.
